highlights.description: Migrate to batteries-included plexusone/omnivoice with provider registry pattern

changed.description: Use omnivoice registry pattern (`GetSTTProvider`, `GetTTSProvider`) instead of direct provider imports

dependencies.description: Remove direct imports of `go-elevenlabs` and `omnivoice-deepgram` (now indirect via omnivoice)

documentation.description: Update README to reference `plexusone/omnivoice` instead of `agentplexus/omnivoice`

highlights.description: Project renamed to VideoAsCode with new `vac` CLI
Breaking change: Module path changed to `github.com/grokify/videoascode`

changed.description: Refactored to use `ffutil` package for FFmpeg/FFprobe operations

documentation.description: Added known limitations section for v0.3.0
Updated all documentation with new project name and CLI commands

chore.description: Remove scroll debug output from browser package

highlights.description: Browser video recording with automated browser interactions and synchronized voiceover
Hardware-accelerated encoding via VideoToolbox on macOS
Multi-language pace-to-longest for synchronized video output

added.description: Browser automation package (`pkg/browser`) with Rod-based recording
Segment abstraction layer (`pkg/segment`) for unified content handling
Source loading package (`pkg/source`) for config and transcript files
Unified configuration package (`pkg/config`) with YAML support
Video provider pattern (`pkg/video/provider.go`) for extensible video generation
Media duration utilities (`pkg/media`) for audio/video duration detection
Segment orchestrator for coordinating TTS, video, and audio combination
TTS support for browser segments with per-step voiceovers
Browser step types: navigate, click, input, scroll, wait, hover, keypress, evaluate
Click-by-text-content with textMatch modes (contains, exact, regex)
Scroll modes: relative (delta) and absolute (position)
Scroll behavior: auto (instant) and smooth (animated with auto-wait)
Hardware-accelerated encoding via `--fast` flag (VideoToolbox on macOS)
Subtitle burning via `--subtitles-burn` flag
Silent video generation via `--no-audio` flag
Testing flags `--limit` and `--limit-steps` for partial content generation
Multi-language pace-to-longest for synchronized video timing
Browser video guide with complete documentation
Example browser demo configs in `examples/browser-demo/`

changed.description: Transcript schema extended with BrowserStep and SourceType fields

documentation.description: Added language duration comparison table to multi-language guide
Added step duration guidelines to browser video guide
Updated CLI reference with browser commands and new flags
Updated README with browser video features

highlights.description: Mixed audio sample rate support for multi-provider TTS workflows

fixed.description: Video concatenation now handles mixed audio sample rates from different TTS providers (e.g., ElevenLabs at 44100 Hz, Deepgram at 22050 Hz) using filter_complex concat instead of demuxer concat
Debug mode (`MARP2VIDEO_DEBUG=1`) no longer causes 'Stdout already set' error

documentation.description: Added `--subtitles` and `--subtitles-lang` flags to video command in README
Updated complete workflow guide with subtitle embedding instructions
Added troubleshooting guide with common issues and solutions
Updated architecture docs with mixed audio sample rate handling details

dependencies.description: Upgrade `github.com/plexusone/omnivoice` to v0.4.3 for subtitle line count fix and Chinese/English subtitle tests

highlights.description: Automatic subtitle generation with STT (Speech-to-Text) support
OmniVoice integration for unified TTS/STT provider abstraction
Dictionary-based case correction for proper noun capitalization in subtitles

added.description: Subtitle generator with STT support for automatic caption generation
`subtitle` CLI command for generating subtitles from audio
`stt` CLI command for speech-to-text transcription
Subtitle embedding support (soft subtitles) via ffmpeg
Subtitle burning support (hard-coded subtitles) via ffmpeg
Dictionary-based case correction with built-in tech terms
Custom dictionary support via JSON files
OmniVoice TTS provider wrapper for unified interface
OmniVoice STT provider wrapper for unified interface
TTS provider override and provider-specific settings clearing
Path sanitization for safe ffmpeg subprocess execution

changed.description: Refactored orchestrator and audio player for OmniVoice integration

documentation.description: Added complete workflow guide: Marp to video with subtitles
Added subtitle generation features to README
Added subtitle guide and dual-language TRD

chore.description: Fix lint errors and apply gofmt

highlights.description: Convert Marp presentations to narrated videos with AI-generated voiceovers
Multi-language transcript support with ElevenLabs TTS integration
Image-based video generation for reliable, high-quality output

added.description: CLI tool with `tts` and `video` subcommands
Marp markdown parser with voiceover comment extraction (`<!-- voiceover: ... -->`)
Pause directive support (`<!-- pause: 500 -->`) for timing control
ElevenLabs TTS integration for audio generation
Multi-language transcript package with JSON schema
Support for BCP-47 locale codes (en-US, es-ES, zh-Hans, fr-FR, etc.)
`tts` subcommand for generating audio from transcript.json files
TTS resume support with `--force` flag to skip existing audio files
Audio manifest for tracking generated files and durations
Image-based video generation using Marp PNG export
Video combining with optional crossfade transitions
Individual slide video export for platforms like Udemy
Progress bar during conversion with multi-stage tracking
`--verbose` flag for debug logging
Cross-platform support: macOS, Linux, Windows
Self-documenting intro example with 13 slides
Simplified Chinese and French translations for intro example

fixed.description: Nil pointer dereference with slog logger

documentation.description: Comprehensive README with installation, usage, and troubleshooting
Example presentation with OmniVoice TTS workflow
